title: Wynncraft Overhauled Experience
description: Realistic game experience, here you come! With some extra QoL and a heck lot of optimization!
body:
# Wynncraft Overhauled Experience ### Description Experience Wynncraft like never before, with a modpack that combines Olinus10's amazing modpacks shown in his videos, with our own additions. Designed specifically for Minecraft's largest MMORPG, this modpack is your gateway to a smoother and more immersive adventure. Featuring essential quality of life improvements and optimization mods, it significantly boosts gameplay performance and FPS without losing the classic look and feel that Wynncraft fans love. Dive into a totally overhauled experience, where every quest, battle, and exploration feels more refined and enjoyable. Whether you're a veteran or new to the game, this modpack is the perfect companion for your epic journey!
Features • Wyntils minimap complete with the possibility of adding waypoints
• Better class selection menu
• Overhauled graphics
• Immersive gameplay without nametags, armor and such
• Suited for even the most low-end system
• Even better textures
• Life-like physics
• Overhauled animations
• Goofy expresions functionality (see the FAQ on how to enable)
• And more, discover it for yourself!
### Mods Not updated yet, the list is innacurate (and too big).

### FAQ
What is Wynncraft? Wynncraft is a Minecraft MMORPG server set in a fantasy world with multiple provinces. Players choose from various classes, each with unique abilities, and engage in quests, dungeons, and raids that feature deep lore and diverse gameplay. The game includes professions like mining and crafting, supporting both solo and cooperative play through guilds and PvP arenas. Known for its custom textures and active development, Wynncraft offers a rich RPG experience within Minecraft.
What is the goal of this modpack? We started this modpack after seeing Olinus10's Ultimate Overhaul video, after which we thought: "Wouldn't it be handy to also have this modpack right on Modrinth?" After the first trial and error we finally succeeded, after having slightly upgraded it a bit, as some mods weren't available or caused crashes, and seeing some extra optimization mods to let it run on our outdated laptops.
Our interest and maintenance sank away a bit, but was rekindled after Olinus10's new video came out, his Majestic Overhaul. We then combined these two videos and a bit of our own 'mystery sauce' to create the Ultimate Overhauled Experience for Wynncraft.
Which platforms is this modpack made for? This modpack is based on Modrinth, but it is also possible to run it on Lunar Client. For the Vanilla-launcher fans, you can download it in the modrinth launcher, and then open the files and move it to your mod files in a 'vanilla' Fabric instance.
Can I run the game with shaders? Even though this modpack offers a lot of optimization, we do not reccomend people that have 30 FPS or less without them to run shaders. Anything above 60 FPS should be fine, and between 30 and 60 FPS might be a little laggy, but should be playable.
How to enable expresions? Use the video below or Just Expressions' wiki. We reccomend you start the video at 1:53, because the part before that is just about what was updated.
### Disclaimers • This is a fan-made product. We are unaffiliated with Mojang or Wynncraft.
• We are 2 school-going teenagers, so forgive us if we are slow with updating and responding to issues
